full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Assad Vala, Caught by Roston Chase!! Stunner! Chase has plucked off a blinder. short_text: Alei Nao to Charles, Lbw!! A dream start for Alei Nao. Gets a wicket off his first ball. Charles has to go for a golden
full_text: Alei Nao to Charles, Lbw!! A dream start for Alei Nao. Gets a wicket off his first ball. Charles has to go for a golden duck. The nipbacker on the stumps, Charles' feet does not move much, the bat gets stuck and it does not prevent the ball from rapping the pad. Struck above the kneeroll, and the only question was if it would have gone over the stumps. No. It is clipping and the original decision stands. PNG have the early wicket they needed. Charles goes but does not waste a review.
